confirm.deactivate:
Deactivate {{name}}?

The module sections will no longer be visible in the menu. Your data will not be deleted.
confirm.deactivate_cashflow: Warning: this is the foundational module. The cashflow dashboard and data management will no longer be accessible.
confirm.activate_commerce: Activating Commerce will also activate: Product Catalog and Customer Analytics.
confirm.activate_customers_light: Activating Customer Analytics will also activate Commerce Signals.

cashflow_monitor.name: Cashflow Monitor
cashflow_monitor.desc: Track and analyze daily cash inflows and outflows with AI-powered insights.
cashflow_monitor.unlocks: Unlocks: cashflow dashboard, sales/expenses/purchases data management, AI analytics

customers_light.name: Customer Intelligence
customers_light.desc: Operational customer analysis: trends, churn risk, segmentation, follow-up priorities.
customers_light.unlocks: Unlocks: customer dashboard inside the Customers section with metrics, filters and triage

product_catalog.name: Product Catalog
product_catalog.desc: Product analytics: margins, cost coverage, ABC analysis, category performance.
product_catalog.unlocks: Unlocks: catalog analytics inside the Products section with margins and classification

commerce_signals.name: Commerce Signals
commerce_signals.desc: Prioritized commercial signals: customer reactivation, concentration risk, new customer conversion.
commerce_signals.unlocks: Unlocks: commerce signals dashboard with prioritized actions

revenue_forecasting.name: Revenue Forecasting
revenue_forecasting.desc: AI-powered revenue predictions based on historical data and market trends.

expense_optimizer.name: Expense Optimizer
expense_optimizer.desc: Identify cost-saving opportunities and optimize spending patterns.

inventory_tracker.name: Inventory Tracker
inventory_tracker.desc: Monitor stock levels, predict shortages, and optimize reordering.
